nasb.text: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son makes a father glad, But a foolish son is a grief to his mother.

esv.text: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son makes a glad father, but a foolish son is a sorrow to his mother.

cnv.text: 所羅門的箴言： 智慧的兒子使父親歡樂， 愚昧的兒子使母親憂愁。

ccb.text: 以下是所罗门的箴言： 智慧儿使父亲快乐， 愚昧儿叫母亲担忧。

csbs.text: 所罗门的箴言： 有智慧的儿子使父亲欢喜； 愚昧的儿子使母亲愁苦。
